tdj039mpxkk9.name: Some Stripe Payment Checkouts may fail with a generic error when a credit card is used as an payment option across multiple shops.
tdj039mpxkk9.last_update:
We can confirm that merchants with Stripe Payment Gateway enabled may experienc one of the following:

* Multiple payment options enabled, Checkouts will not surface the credit card form.
* Merchants with only credit cards enabled, Checkouts will continue to surface and continue to see processing and other errors.
